born 1962 is a Chinese scientist specializing in distributed computing . He is the current vice-president of National University of Defense Technology and dean of its School of Computing. 1 2 Early life edit Wang was born in Nanjing , Jiangsu in 1962. 3 Honours and awards edit November 22, 2019 Member of the Chinese Academy of Sciences CAS 4 References edit .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3 body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output
